Class Controller

java.lang.Object
Controller.Controller
public class Controller extends Object
Connects the interface to the model. It validates input, creates, edits and deletes events and asks the storage to persist them. It has no direct access to screen elements: the view is notified through the model's property-change events.

    Moves the view one step forward, by an amount that depends on the view mode.

  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller(CalendarModel model, EventStorage storage)
      Creates the controller.
      Parameters:
      model - the calendar model
      storage - the storage used to persist events

  • Method Details

    • getModel

      public CalendarModel getModel()
      Returns:
      the calendar model

    • buildEvent

      public Event buildEvent(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, long duration, String title, String category, String location, String description, long reminderLead, Recurrence recurrence, List<Attendee> attendees) throws EventValidationException
      Builds an event from the form data, validating everything.
      Parameters:
      year - starting year
      month - starting month (1-12)
      day - starting day of month
      hour - starting hour (0-23)
      minute - starting minute (0-59)
      duration - duration in minutes
      title - event title
      category - event category
      location - event location
      description - free-text description
      reminderLead - reminder lead time in minutes
      recurrence - recurrence rule
      attendees - list of attendees
      Returns:
      the validated event
      Throws:
      EventValidationException - if any field is invalid

    • createEvent

      public boolean createEvent(Event e) throws StorageException
      Adds a new event.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to add
      Returns:
      false if an event with this title already exists
      Throws:
      StorageException - if saving fails

    • replaceEvent

      public boolean replaceEvent(Event oldEvent, Event newEvent) throws StorageException
      Replaces an event with an edited version.
      Parameters:
      oldEvent - the event being replaced
      newEvent - the edited event
      Returns:
      false if the new title already belongs to another event (in which case the old event is kept)
      Throws:
      StorageException - if saving fails

    • editOccurrence

      public void editOccurrence(Event master, LocalDate day, Event edited) throws StorageException
      Edits only the occurrence on the given day: it is taken out of the series and turned into a stand-alone event.
      Parameters:
      master - the recurring event
      day - the day of the occurrence being edited
      edited - the edited stand-alone event
      Throws:
      StorageException - if saving fails

    • deleteEvent

      public void deleteEvent(Event e) throws StorageException
      Deletes an event entirely.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to delete
      Throws:
      StorageException - if saving fails

    • deleteOccurrence

      public void deleteOccurrence(Event master, LocalDate day) throws StorageException
      Deletes only the occurrence on the given day, keeping the rest of the series.
      Parameters:
      master - the recurring event
      day - the day of the occurrence to delete
      Throws:
      StorageException - if saving fails

    • search

      public List<Event> search(String keyword)
      Searches the events for a keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the text to look for
      Returns:
      the matching events

    • selectDate

      public void selectDate(LocalDate day)
      Selects a day and clears the current event selection.
      Parameters:
      day - the day to select

    • setViewMode

      public void setViewMode(ViewMode mode)
      Changes the active view mode.
      Parameters:
      mode - the new view mode

    • setDarkMode

      public void setDarkMode(boolean dark)
      Switches between the light and dark themes.
      Parameters:
      dark - true for the dark theme

    • goToday

      public void goToday()
      Jumps the view to today's date.

    • goPrevious

      public void goPrevious()
      Moves the view one step back, by an amount that depends on the view mode.

    • goNext

      public void goNext()
      Moves the view one step forward, by an amount that depends on the view mode.

    • loadFromDisk

      public void loadFromDisk() throws StorageException
      Loads the events from disk into the model.
      Throws:
      StorageException - if reading fails
